creator: gspurki@gmail.com
text:
Since some time the Website (https://www.freebsd.org/) and Bugs (https://bugs.freebsd.org) are really slow:

-Website needs 4.7sec to load the last element (https://www.freebsd.org/images/25thanniversary.png)

-Bugs needs 6.6sec to load.

Lets compare it to lets say NetBSD:

-https://www.netbsd.org/ 418ms

Having a slow Website is a really bad advertisement for a (normally) fast OS, remember the Amazon 100ms-study ;)
